name: nextjs-app-router/pre-existing-vendor
notes: Next.js App Router with @amplitude/analytics-browser pre-installed. Exercises 'augment, don't replace' — the agent must migrate the project to @amplitude/unified, removing the legacy browser SDK from package.json and refactoring the existing init wrapper. This is the canonical Ring 1 scenario for SDK-major coexistence regressions: a clean run leaves @amplitude/unified as the only Amplitude package, and Layer 0's correct-sdk-package hard-fails if both packages survive together (failure mode #10 in the spec).
